farmers.name: Ramesh Patil
farmers.story: Ramesh took over his family's 4-acre plot after his father's passing and converted it to organic strawberry and vegetable cultivation in 2015. He now mentors six neighbouring farmers on drip irrigation.

farmers.name: Lakshmi Devi
farmers.story: Lakshmi runs a women-led cooperative of 12 farms producing cold-pressed groundnut and sesame oil using traditional wooden ghani presses, preserving a method her grandmother used.

farmers.name: Gurpreet Singh
farmers.story: Gurpreet's family has grown wheat and pulses on the same land for three generations. He recently added a natural jaggery unit powered by sugarcane grown on-site.

farmers.name: Meena Nair
farmers.story: Meena grows shade-tolerant spices — cardamom, pepper, and turmeric — under a native tree canopy, a method that keeps her small forest-farm biodiverse.

farmers.name: Bhagwan Das
farmers.story: Bhagwan's orchard produces table grapes and pomegranates. He pioneered a farmer WhatsApp group in his village that now shares weather alerts and market prices with 80+ members.

products.name: Wai Valley Organic Strawberries
products.shortDescription: Hand-picked this morning from Wai's strawberry belt — sweet, deep red, no wax coating.
products.description: Grown without synthetic pesticides on Ramesh Patil's family farm in Wai, these strawberries are picked at first light and dispatched the same day through our cold-chain network. Best consumed within 3 days of delivery.
products.storageInstructions: Refrigerate at 2–4°C. Do not wash until ready to eat.

products.name: Kolar Cold-Pressed Groundnut Oil
products.shortDescription: Wood-pressed the traditional way — unrefined, aromatic, and rich in flavour.
products.description: Pressed in small batches on a wooden ghani by Lakshmi Devi's women's cooperative in Kolar. No heat, no chemicals, no refining — just groundnuts and pressure.
products.storageInstructions: Store in a cool, dark place. Consume within 6 months of pressing.

products.name: Amritsar Whole Wheat Atta
products.shortDescription: Stone-ground from Punjab wheat, harvested this season and milled fresh to order.
products.description: Grown on Gurpreet Singh's family farm and stone-ground in small batches to preserve the wheat germ and natural sweetness. No bleaching, no additives.
products.storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place. Use within 3 months.

products.name: Wayanad Shade-Grown Turmeric
products.shortDescription: Grown under native forest canopy in Wayanad — high curcumin, deep golden colour.
products.description: Meena Nair grows this turmeric under a mixed native-tree canopy that keeps the soil biodiverse. Sun-dried and stone-ground without additives.
products.storageInstructions: Store in an airtight jar away from direct sunlight.

products.name: Nashik Table Grapes
products.shortDescription: Seedless, crisp, and picked within the last 48 hours from Bhagwan's orchard.
products.description: Bhagwan Das grows these seedless table grapes on trellises above the orchard floor for better airflow and fewer pesticide applications. Harvested early morning to lock in sweetness.

products.name: Wild Forest Honey
products.shortDescription: Raw, unfiltered honey harvested from wild hives in the Wayanad forest belt.
products.description: Collected by tribal beekeeping partners working with Meena Nair's cooperative, this honey is raw and unfiltered — it may crystallise naturally, which is a sign of purity, not a flaw.
products.storageInstructions: Store at room temperature. Do not refrigerate.

products.name: Punjab Jaggery Blocks
products.shortDescription: Made from farm-grown sugarcane, boiled in small batches the traditional way.
products.description: Gurpreet Singh press-boils sugarcane grown on the same land as his wheat, producing jaggery with no chemical clarifiers.
products.storageInstructions: Store in an airtight container. Keep away from moisture.

products.name: Farm & Family Discovery Gift Box
products.shortDescription: A curated box of honey, oil, jaggery, spices and a handwritten farmer note.
products.description: Our most-gifted box: wild forest honey, cold-pressed groundnut oil, jaggery blocks, shade-grown turmeric, a jar of seasonal preserve, and a handwritten note from one of our partner farmers.

p1.note: Runners planted on raised mulch beds.
Drip irrigation, hand-weeded, no synthetic pesticide applied.
Hand-picked at 6:10 AM by Ramesh's team.
Sorted, boxed, and chilled to 4°C within 90 minutes of harvest.

reviews.comment: Tasted like strawberries from my grandmother's garden. Arrived cold and fresh.
Rotis puff up beautifully. Noticeably fresher than store atta.
Crystallised a bit after a month but tastes completely raw and real.
